tools.name: index_hypotheses
tools.title: Index Hypotheses
tools.description: Rebuild the local SQLite research graph from docs/hypotheses, docs/goals, and benchmark run manifests.

path.description: Project root containing docs/hypotheses, docs/goals, and benchmark/runs

tools.name: verify_index
tools.title: Verify Research Index Inputs
tools.description: Validate research frontmatter and run manifests without rebuilding the SQLite index.

path.description: Project root containing docs/hypotheses, docs/goals, and benchmark/runs

tools.name: find_hypotheses
tools.title: Find Hypotheses
tools.description: Search indexed hypotheses by status, goal, task state, source type/year, priority tier, or claim text.

tools.name: inspect_hypothesis
tools.title: Inspect Hypothesis
tools.description: Return a bounded structured view of one hypothesis, including goals, tasks, evidence, runs, sources, and edges.

tools.name: find_evidence
tools.title: Find Evidence
tools.description: Find evidence entries and cited sources, optionally scoped to one hypothesis and source/evidence type.

tools.name: find_runs
tools.title: Find Runs
tools.description: Find targeted or explicit comprehensive benchmark runs by run id, hypothesis id, type, and comprehensive flag; goal metrics derive only from explicit comprehensive runs.

tools.name: trace_lineage
tools.title: Trace Lineage
tools.description: Trace bounded hypothesis lineage and dependency edges around a hypothesis id.

tools.name: analyze_topology
tools.title: Analyze Topology
tools.description: Summarize graph node/edge counts and high-degree hubs without dumping the full graph.

tools.name: audit_orphans
tools.title: Audit Orphans
tools.description: Audit orphaned, stale, missing-evidence, missing-source, dead-branch, task, and goal-run gaps.

tools.name: inspect_goal
tools.title: Inspect Goal
tools.description: Return a bounded structured view of one goal, including parent/child goals, linked hypotheses, and derived metrics_current provenance or missing-metrics reason.

tools.name: trace_goal_tree
tools.title: Trace Goal Tree
tools.description: Trace the bounded goal decomposition tree around one goal id.

tools.name: audit_goal_alignment
tools.title: Audit Goal Alignment
tools.description: Audit hypothesis-goal links, active goals without live hypotheses, goals missing explicit comprehensive-run metrics, and coverage candidates.

tools.name: analyze_progress
tools.title: Analyze Progress
tools.description: Use git diff to identify changed research graph files and field-level frontmatter deltas that should be verified or reindexed.

compare_against.description: Git ref to compare against, default "HEAD"

tools.name: analyze_proposed
tools.title: Analyze Proposed Hypothesis
tools.description: Check one indexed hypothesis for readiness gaps before promotion or implementation.

tools.name: export_canvas
tools.title: Export JSON Canvas
tools.description: Export a bounded JSON Canvas map of goals, hypotheses, runs, and their relationships.

output_path.description: Canvas path relative to project root, default "docs/research-map.canvas"

mode.description: merge preserves existing node positions; overwrite creates a fresh layout

dry_run.description: Preview canvas JSON without writing the file

tools.name: export_research_map
tools.title: Export Research Map Markdown
tools.description: Generate docs/research-map.md from canonical split researchgraph files. Dry-run by default; refuses unmarked legacy overwrite unless force is true.

output_path.description: Markdown path relative to project root, default "docs/research-map.md"

dry_run.description: Preview generated markdown without writing; default true

force.description: Allow replacing an unmarked legacy research-map.md after dry-run review
